problem text: John finds himself in a chamber with five identical portals. Two portals lead to freedom; one exits to a path measuring $2$ miles, while the other leads to a path $5$ miles in length. The remaining three portals return him to the chamber through magical routes; one measures $3$ miles, another $4$ miles, and the last is $1$ mile long. If John is returned to the chamber, the portals are rearranged and appear identical again. How many miles will John walk before escaping?
